content.en:
After some fighting, Ye Tian's Abyss Ancient Ape copied his body and escaped.

And this abyssal python didn't keep chasing and killing, after all, the other party didn't have any intelligence, and he didn't have the idea of chasing and killing to the end.

Afterwards.

The abyssal supreme dao creatures that Ye Tian encountered were all extremely powerful, but the number of abyssal supreme dao creatures here was not much, if there were a lot, wouldn't the Innate Origin Domain Alliance not be opponents, then it would be abnormal.

"Found a low-quality first-order supreme rule item!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

It seems that there are a lot of first-order supreme rule items here, and it didn't take long to find one after I came in.

He also put it away and continued to search for the treasure.

In order to prevent himself from being killed, he made another copy of his body, which would ensure that he would not fall at the same time.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian gradually figured out the strength of the abyssal supreme dao creatures in the depths of the eternal dark abyss, there were a total of one hundred and twenty-two abyssal supreme dao creatures here, most of them belonged to the second-grade elders, among them, there were about a dozen abyssal supreme dao creatures comparable to the thirty-six elder level.

Ye Tian's Abyssal Abyss Ancient Ape Replica Body would be killed in seconds when it encountered them.

this day.

Ye Tian found an Abyssal Dao creature, the Abyss Titan, fighting with another Abyssal Dao creature.

These two Abyssal Supreme Dao creatures were all thirty-six elder-level existences, and Ye Tian took the opportunity to enter the lair of the Abyss Titan.

Really.

There are a lot of good things in the Abyss Titan's lair, and although the Abyss Titan has no intelligence, he still has instincts, and instincts have collected some good things.

Ye Tian took the pot directly, and then quickly escaped.

Once the Abyss Titan returns, instinctively becomes enraged and hunts him down.

Therefore, he must take the opportunity to give away these treasures.

Of course.

The Abyssal Ape Replica Body will definitely not be able to get out, after all, this Replica Body is also an Abyssal Dao Creature, and it will definitely be sealed here.

But he can copy his real body and copy his body, so he is not restricted and can get out of here.

This formation was arranged by the First Patriarch, and only restricted the Abyss Dao creatures, if it was to restrict the Patriarch, then how could they go in and clean up the Abyss Dao creatures?

Soon, Ye Tian condensed his true body to copy his body.

As soon as the True Body Replica Body appeared, it immediately attracted a terrifying Abyss Supreme Dao Creature.

They are extremely disgusted by the aura of the patriarch, and instinct will kill.

"Gotta go!"

Ye Tian escaped from the depths of the Eternal Darkness Abyss with many treasures, but on the periphery, he was also besieged by a large number of Abyssal Dao creatures.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian fought all the way out, and finally came out of the eternal dark abyss at the cost of heavy damage.

"Sure enough, even with my strength, I may fall on the periphery of the Eternal Darkness Abyss. If I hadn't stacked too much of the Supreme Legendary Body, I would have fallen inside!" Ye Tian muttered.

And just when Ye Tian came out, a large number of Abyss Supreme Dao creatures rushed out.

Outside the Eternal Darkness Abyss, Ye Tian's strength can be fully exerted, and he can also use the formation here to suppress these Abyss Dao creatures, and he can block these Abyss Dao creatures with his own strength.

If you really can't stop it, you can also ask for support.

But Ye Tian didn't need support yet.

"It's up to you, you also want to come out, and look for death!"

Ye Tian urged the big array, and he shot with all his might.

Airplanes!!!!

The first sequence of supreme dao rules turned into threads of silk that ran through the body of a famous abyssal supreme dao creature, blasting them to death, and their corpses fell into the eternal dark abyss one after another.

Gradually, the other abyssal Dao creatures were instinctively frightened, and they didn't dare to rush out.

In a few moments, the Eternal Darkness Abyss returned to normal.

......

"Whew, it's finally done!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief, at least he could rest.

Subsequently.

He began to sort out the resources, and asked another replica body with the Eye of Identification to come over, and he wanted to identify these items, especially the two Innate Primordial Treasures found from the Abyss Titan's Lair.

Soon.

Ye Tian has the copy body of the identification.

So, he began to identify these two innate primordial treasures.

The first Innate Primordial Treasure was quickly identified.

The Innate Primordial Treasure Escape Domain Stone, with extremely strong power to escape the sky, can cross a long territory in an instant, and cannot be intercepted unless it is the first sequence of Dao rules

"It's not a bad innate primordial treasure, it's suitable for ordinary patriarchs to use, if you don't encounter a demon venerable who has mastered the rules of the first sequence of supreme paths, you can use it to escape. Go back and refine it for your son, it's enough for him to save his life. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to identify the second innate primordial treasure, this innate primordial treasure seemed to be a little special, it was a disc, there were holes in the door, he actually sensed the breath of the rule of the Dao from it, and it was a very special rule of the Dao.

"Identification!"

The eye of identification slowly identified, and it has not been identified for a long time.

Obviously, the grade of this Innate Primordial Treasure was much higher than the Eye of Identification, so it would take a long time to identify it.

After a long time, the results came out.

Innate Primordial Treasure Eternal Rule Disk, with the ability to fuse to Dao Rule items, up to the first sequence of Dao Rule items, and can also consume Dao Rule items to form an indestructible rule shield

"Fusion of the First Sequence to the Path Rule Item ???"

Ye Tian was surprised.

Copying talents also has the ability to fuse, but it's useless now, and many high-level items can't be fused, let alone fuse the first sequence to the Dao rule items.

But this Eternal Rule Disk Innate Primordial Treasure can do it, and I don't know what the first sequence of Supreme Dao Rule items that are fused will become.

"You can try it!"

His first-order supreme rules have been completed, and the first-order supreme rules items he found this time are all low-quality, and they can't be used by his son, wife, and daughter, and the side effects are too great.

Therefore, if it is fused, it will be fused, and there is no big loss.

Immediately.

He took out nine first-order Supreme Rule items and placed them into the holes of the Eternal Rule Disk, attempting to fuse them.

"No way!"

He didn't have the ability to fuse, and the Innate Primordial Treasure had to study its ability step by step before he could really use it.

Thereupon.

He spent the rest of his life studying the power of the Eternal Rule Plate.

He took out some low-quality Fifth Sequence Supreme Rule items to try them out.

And just like that, the long years passed.

On this day, he finally studied the ability of the Eternal Rule Disk.
